title: The Ethereum Application Stack
description: A layered diagram showing the core components of the Ethereum technology stack, from the base infrastructure to the user-facing applications.
relationships: The Consensus Layer secures the network and orders transactions, which are processed by the Execution Layer on the EVM. Smart Contracts are deployed to and run on the EVM. dApp Front-ends use Web3 libraries to interact with the Smart Contracts and the blockchain.
